policy: Required baseline cannot be older than the scanned source hash set; critical/high runtime code must have syntax pass, zero zero_tolerance issues, complexity within tier threshold, explicit test binding, and scanner availability/fallback proof.
purpose: Make CDR code acceptance consume concrete lint/security scanner baselines rather than relying only on abstract quality packets.

scanner_layers.evidence: baseline JSON with syntax, complexity proxy, broad-except, dynamic-exec, unsafe path, secret literal, TODO debt, and test binding findings
